description: Todd Stevens discusses Figure's dual business model focusing on blockchain and traditional finance, highlighting their commitment to integrating DeFi with Solana. He emphasizes the launch of a yield-bearing stablecoin and the potential for democratizing access to prime brokerage for the DeFi community.
topic_summary: In this talk, Todd Stevens outlines Figure's strategy to leverage blockchain technology in lending and capital markets, aiming to bring real-world assets to the DeFi ecosystem on Solana. He discusses the introduction of a yield-bearing stablecoin and the opportunity to democratize prime brokerage access, targeting a $850 billion market.
